title: Building Frames
body:
![Placing random blocks using building frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6274d35991ba3dd19040ba187fc67d5d6a2d4e97.gif)

Easily make textured builds with building frames - when placed, they'll randomly pick a block from inside the shulker in your off hand to place instead. There's also frames for stairs, slabs and walls/fences, which automatically converts full blocks into the desired shape, reducing inventory clutter.
